description_long: This sculpture features two stylized human hands reaching toward each other, set within two interlocking circular rings. The hands and rings are mounted atop a domed, tiled pedestal, which itself sits on a circular base of dark stone, surrounded by a wider ring of light-colored paving stones. The front of the pedestal displays a relief of a bird in flight, adding a symbolic element to the composition. The sculpture is rendered in a metallic gray material, giving it a modern and durable appearance. The overall design is both abstract and evocative, suggesting themes of connection, unity, and aspiration. The setting and base indicate it is intended for prominent public display, likely in a plaza or park.
description: A modern sculpture of two hands reaching toward each other within interlocking rings, mounted on a domed pedestal with a bird relief, set on a circular stone base.
description_view_0: Front view showing both hands reaching toward each other within the rings and the bird relief on the pedestal.
description_view_1: Rear view revealing the solid back of the domed pedestal and the thin profile of the rings and hands.
description_view_2: Alternate front view similar to view 0, with clear visibility of the hands, rings, and bird relief.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view, again showing the back of the pedestal and the narrow side of the sculpture.
attribute_subject_matter: two human hands reaching within interlocking rings and a bird relief
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is set on a circular paved base, suggesting installation in an outdoor urban plaza or park.
